/usr/bin/c++ -Os -g -DNDEBUG "CMakeFiles/topology-example-sim.dir/topology-example-sim.cc.o" -o /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/src/topology-read/examples/ns3.45-topology-example-sim-default   -L/home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib -Wl,--no-as-needed /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-topology-read-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-nix-vector-routing-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-point-to-point-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-applications-default.so -Wl,--as-needed /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-internet-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-bridge-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-traffic-control-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-network-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-stats-default.so /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-core-default.so -Wl,--no-as-needed -Wl,--as-needed
